title: No fire- beats edition
description: Bruh this just removes the fire on the screen,lol
body:
# What does this add?

**Low fire**
_why do i need this pack?_

- Makes the screen clear.
- good for pvp.
- packs like THESE are used by many skilled minecraft players.

# ❓Its not working

-Put it on the top!

**Need more help?**
-Join my dc server and create a ticket:[https://discord.gg/9NrzSShHpg](https://discord.gg/9NrzSShHpg)
